isolation.tab: Forgetting & CV only (no era filter changes)

steps.action: Navigate to http://localhost:8050 and click '🧪 Forgetting & CV' tab
steps.expected: Forgetting Depth & Cross-Validation Analysis page with two charts
steps.observed: Page displayed with 'Forgetting Depth & Strict Score' section (2 charts) and 'Cross-Validation Results' section

steps.action: Verify forgetting_depth chart shows experiments with data
steps.expected: Chart shows only experiments that have forgetting_depth data (~10-15 from exp_lme_0059+)
steps.observed: Chart shows 23 total experiments: 16 passed (green) + 7 failed (red). Includes both old-era (exp_0025-exp_0040) and new-era (exp_lme_0059-exp_lme_0069) experiments that have forgetting_depth. 7 new-era experiments shown (exp_lme_0059, 0060, 0061, 0062, 0064, 0065, 0069).

steps.expected: Green bars for passed, red bars for failed
steps.observed: Passed experiments shown in green (#4CAF50), Failed experiments shown in red (#EF5350). Barmode is 'group' with separate trace names 'Passed' and 'Failed'.

steps.action: Verify distribution chart excludes experiments without forgetting_depth
steps.expected: exp_0000 and exp_lme_0008 NOT shown in the distribution
steps.observed: Confirmed: exp_0000 and exp_lme_0008 are NOT present in either passed or failed x-arrays.
X-axis labeled 'Experiment' with experiment IDs (exp_0025, exp_0026, etc.)

steps.action: Verify tooltip shows forgetting_depth and strict_score
steps.expected: Hover shows forgetting_depth value and strict_score
steps.observed:
Passed bars hovertemplate: '%{x}
Forgetting Depth: %{y:.4f}
Strict Score: %{customdata:.4f}'. Failed bars hovertemplate: '%{x}
Forgetting Depth: %{y:.4f}
Status: %{customdata}'.

steps.expected: Separate chart for strict score below forgetting depth
steps.observed: Second chart titled 'Strict Score Distribution (Pass/Fail Classification)' with 16 'Passed (≥0.4)' and 7 'Failed (<0.4 / validation_failed)' experiments.
Chart data confirmed: exp_lme_0059 forgetting_depth=0.3675 (exact match), strict_score=0.458456 (exact match)

steps.action: Navigate to Forgetting & CV tab, find CV experiment selector
steps.expected: Dropdown with experiments that have CV data
steps.observed: Dropdown 'Select experiment with CV data...' with 7 options: exp_0315, exp_lme_0008, exp_lme_0046, exp_lme_0049, exp_lme_0051, exp_lme_0056, exp_lme_0090

steps.expected: Fold scores bar chart and fold deltas chart displayed
steps.observed: Charts loaded with exp_lme_0008 data. Fold scores chart (5 bars) and fold deltas chart visible.

steps.action: Verify fold scores bar chart shows k=5 folds with correct scores
steps.observed: Fold 1: 0.3852, Fold 2: 0.3366, Fold 3: 0.3069, Fold 4: 0.3639, Fold 5: 0.3404 — all match cv_results.json fold_scores overall_score values exactly.
Annotation text: 'Mean: 0.3466 ± 0.0296' at y=0.3466 with dashed blue mean line. Matches cv_results.json: mean.overall_score=0.3466, std.overall_score=0.0296.

steps.expected: Fold with lowest score highlighted differently
steps.observed: Fold 3 (score 0.3069, the minimum) highlighted in red (#EF5350). Other folds shown in green (#4CAF50) and orange (#FF9800).

steps.action: Verify fold deltas chart shows deviation from mean
steps.observed: Fold 1: +0.0668, Fold 2: -0.0291, Fold 3: +0.0037, Fold 4: -0.0898, Fold 5: +0.0484 — all match cv_results.json fold_deltas exactly.

steps.action: Select exp_lme_0056 (validation_failed but has CV data)
steps.expected: CV data displays correctly despite validation_failed status
steps.observed: Charts updated to exp_lme_0056. Title: 'Cross-Validation Fold Scores — exp_lme_0056'. Fold scores: [0.3895, 0.3282, 0.3111, 0.3541, 0.3440]. Mean: 0.3454 ± 0.0296. All values match cv_results.json.
Fold deltas: [+0.0676, -0.0300, +0.0058, -0.0913, +0.0479] — match cv_results.json fold_deltas exactly.

frictions.description: The Dash Radix dropdown (cv-exp-selector) does not respond to standard agent-browser click on options from the accessibility tree snapshot. The option click registers (returns success) but does not update the selection or trigger the Dash callback. Workaround: use JavaScript eval with setTimeout to open dropdown and click option programmatically.
frictions.resolution: Used eval to call btn.click() then setTimeout to find and click the [role=option] element for exp_lme_0056.

summary: Tested 2 assertions: both PASSED. VAL-PARAMS-003: Forgetting depth and strict score charts display 23 experiments (16 passed, 7 failed) with correct pass/fail classification, exclusion of experiments without data, correct tooltip info, and values matching results.json. VAL-PARAMS-004: CV fold scores and fold deltas charts display correctly for exp_lme_0008 (k=5, mean=0.3466±0.0296, worst fold highlighted) and handle the exp_lme_0056 edge case (validation_failed but has CV data) correctly.
